title: DeprecatedWorkload
content:
# DeprecatedWorkload

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### apply_legacy_workload(data: Optional[Union[requests.LegacyWorkloadApply, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Initiate final deploy action for the downloaded Workloads. Only valid for Workloads that were previously deployed with the keys `staged` set to true and `instantly_apply` set to false.


### deploy_legacy_workload(data: Optional[Union[requests.LegacyWorkloadDeploy, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyWorkloadDeploy

Deploy an App from the App Registry as a Workload to a Cluster/Node.


### list_legacy_workloads(search: Optional[Sequence[str]], app_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], app_version: Optional[Sequence[str]], acp_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], cluster_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], node_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], workload_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], enabled: Optional[bool], asset_name: Optional[str], staged: Optional[bool], download_statuses: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[responses.LegacyWorkloadItem], responses.LegacyWorkloadsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Workload objects. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### get_legacy_workload_configuration(workload_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyWorkloadConfigurationGet

Retrieve the configuration of a Workload.


### update_legacy_workload_configuration(workload_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.LegacyWorkloadConfigurationUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyWorkloadConfigurationUpdate

Update the configuration of a Workload.


### download_legacy_workload(workload_name: str, address: Optional[bool], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> str

Download the Workload package file for offline installation on the Edge System. The system automatically generates the file for download if the package is not already available.


### get_legacy_workload(workload_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyWorkloadGet

Retrieve the parameters of a Workload.


### get_legacy_workload_logs(workload_name: str, tail_lines: Optional[int], since_time: Optional[datetime], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyWorkloadLogsGet

Get Workload Logs


### start_workload(workload_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Start running the Workload.


### stop_workload(workload_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Stop running the Workload.


### undeploy_workload(workload_name: str, staged: Optional[bool], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Undeploy Workload from the Edge System.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.deprecated_workload.apply_legacy_workload()
